name: MD Foysal Ahmed
title: AI Researcher & Software Engineer
bio: AI researcher specializing in computer vision and deep learning. Published in peer-reviewed journals with focus on practical applications in medical imaging, robotics, and efficient AI deployment.
summary: AI researcher and software engineer with M.E. in Software Engineering and B.E. in Computer Science from Southwest University of Science and Technology. Published research appears in leading journals including AI and Ethics, Pattern Analysis and Applications, and Signal Image and Video Processing. Research interests span computer vision, deep neural networks, robotic systems, and ethical AI frameworks.

education.degree: Master of Engineering in Software Engineering
education.institution: Southwest University of Science and Technology

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science and Technology
education.institution: Southwest University of Science and Technology

awards: 3rd Prize Sichuan Biomedical Engineering Design Competition 2024
